name: GOLFTEC Vernon Hills
address: 701 N Milwaukee Ave #116, Vernon Hills, IL 60061
about: GOLFTEC Vernon Hills is part of a national chain providing indoor golf lessons, club fitting, and practice facilities. The venue utilizes advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to offer data-driven coaching and practice sessions. Their services are built on a proven system for improvement, catering to golfers of all skill levels looking to enhance their game through personalized instruction and practice memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION, high-speed video, and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized coaching with PGA-certified instructors focused on long-term improvement
Data-driven approach to club fitting, providing an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Structured practice plans and memberships for accelerated skill development

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. However, club fitting services are available to help you find the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage services, so bringing your own may be permissible, but it's best to confirm with the location directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a standard time for 18 holes on a simulator. This would likely depend on the software and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility appears to focus on adult instruction and serious practice, with no specific mention of junior programs or youth-friendly amenities.
